commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ab8db1c6b691e96a3dbaf9ac5607c1841b2aae4d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves HTTP/API script proof for OpenAI-compatible chat tools, OpenAI web_search, and OpenWebUI into QA Lab scenario YAML/Vitest e2e files and updates changed-test routing to those QA Lab targets.

PR surface: Tests -12, Other +161. Total +149 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the PR adds two `runtimeParityTier: live-only` Vitest scenarios, while current `runQaSuiteCommand` expands tier selections and rejects non-flow scenarios for multipass. I did not run the command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer should decide whether native QA evidence can participate in runtimeParityTier filters or whether these tags should be removed before merge.

target.title: test: fold HTTP API script proof into QA Lab
target.body:
## Summary

- Rebase the branch onto latest `origin/main` after #94702 merged, keeping the folded scenarios on dotted QA coverage IDs.
- Fold the OpenAI-compatible chat tools, OpenAI web_search minimal, native web_search assertion, and OpenWebUI probe script tests into QA Lab native evidence paths.
- Add QA scenario YAML entries for the folded HTTP/API proof so taxonomy coverage now fulfills `gateway.tool-invocation-api`, `gateway.openai-compatible-apis`, `runtime.reasoning-and-cache-controls`, `web-search.openai-native-web-search`, and `plugins.web-search-and-fetch`.
- Update changed-test routing so edits to the existing Docker/client scripts run the new QA Lab evidence files.
- Trim script-era cruft from the folded QA Lab tests while keeping behavior-oriented auth and HTTP API assertions.
- Keep folded native Vitest evidence out of runtime parity tier selection so runtime-pair lanes only select flow scenarios.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal-assertions.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-node.mjs qa coverage --json --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-main-rebase-fix.json`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-web-search-native-assertions.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openwebui-openai-compatible.yaml test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal-assertions.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --cached --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: HTTP/API script proof is now represented as QA Lab scenario evidence with primary taxonomy IDs instead of only living under `test/scripts`.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout on this branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Focused Vitest commands listed above, QA coverage report command listed above, oxfmt check, staged whitespace check, and local autoreview.

Evidence after fix: QA coverage report returned 126 scenarios, 172 coverage IDs, 106 primary coverage IDs, and 0 scorecard `*-not-found` issues. The target dotted IDs `gateway.tool-invocation-api`, `gateway.openai-compatible-apis`, `runtime.reasoning-and-cache-controls`, `web-search.openai-native-web-search`, and `plugins.web-search-and-fetch` are fulfilled.

Observed result after fix: Focused tests passed across tooling, e2e, and extension-qa Vitest shards; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: The live Docker lanes `test:docker:openai-chat-tools`, `test:docker:openai-web-search-minimal`, and `test:docker:openwebui` were not run locally.
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
